variants: With her roots in landscape architecture, Samira Abid has emerged as a notable figure in her field. She received her guidance from her doctoral advisor, Karishma Mehta, helping her cultivate a unique perspective on environmental design. Samira holds an Astrostatic Engineer Permit, allowing her to implement intricate designs in her projects. She is also affiliated with the Breezefern Lanternbinders, a club that focuses on melding art with nature. The Limestone Dream Agency serves as her primary funding source, facilitating her ambitious landscape architecture projects.

To further her expertise, Samira has obtained an Astrostatic Engineer Permit, an essential certification in her profession. The Limestone Dream Agency plays a crucial role in funding her research and design initiatives. Her innovative work continues to leave a lasting impact on the field of landscape architecture.
